'''Floaters''' was an umbrella term describing many [[Species/Legends|species]] of animals found in the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheres]] of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] and [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]].

[[File:Floaters-woswfg.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] floaters.]]

The Bespinese species were zooplankton which fed on algae. At least one species of them could also be found in the jungles of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Some species resembled arthropods, while others resembled flying [[Fish/Legends|fish]].

The twelve species of floaters native to [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]] were behemoth-sized creatures, more similar to Bespin's [[Beldon/Legends|beldons]]. Gas-filled beings, ten of the species were herbivores, and were preyed upon by the other two species ("floater sharks" and "floater squid"), which were [[Diet/Legends|carnivores]].
